results.question: 列出所有来自中国的用户
results.generatedSql: SELECT id, username, email, country, joined_at FROM users WHERE country = '中国' ORDER BY id

results.question: 计算上个月的总销售额
results.generatedSql:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', order_date) AS 月份,
    SUM(total_price) AS 总销售额,
    COUNT(id) AS 订单总数,
    ROUND(AVG(total_price), 2) AS 客单价,
    SUM(quantity) AS 总销量
FROM orders
WHERE order_date >= '2024-04-01' 
  AND order_date < '2024-05-01'
GROUP BY 1;

results.question: 找出购买过 Electronics 类产品次数最多的前 3 名用户
results.generatedSql:
SELECT 
    u.username,
    SUM(o.quantity) AS total_items,
    COUNT(o.id) AS order_count,
    SUM(o.total_price) AS total_spent
FROM users u
JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id
WHERE p.category = '电子产品'
GROUP BY u.id, u.username
ORDER BY total_items DESC
LIMIT 3

results.question: 哪些产品的库存已经低于警戒线了？
results.generatedSql: SELECT id, name, category, stock FROM products ORDER BY stock ASC
